name: Butterscotch Toffee Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream until it starts to thicken.
2. Gradually add the butterscotch syrup and vanilla, continuing to beat until thickened.
3. Cut the cake into three horizontal layers.
4. Spread the butterscotch mixture on each layer and sprinkle with Bits O' Brickle.
5. Reassemble the cake and frost the top and sides with the butterscotch mixture.
6. Sprinkle with Bits O' Brickle.
7. Place the cake in the refrigerator and chill for a minimum of 6 hours. Serves 12.
Note: Bette...NM 3/16/94
